images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning 20‑year‑old Japanese idol‑style model, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores, large expressive eyes, a cute‑seductive face, slender hourglass figure, straight black silky hair. She sits on a sleek white sofa in a luxury hotel room bathed in cyber‑punk dual‑tone lighting – cool teal ambience and warm orange accent, bright and clear. She wears a teal seamless sports bra with mesh panels and high‑waist black yoga pants that hug her curves, brushed microfiber with a subtle sheen. A shy smile curves her lips as she glances down, a faint blush on her cheeks; one hand resting on the book beside her, the other on her thigh. Background softly blurred (bokeh). Captured with a Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑tracing, global illumination, teal‑and‑orange cinematic grade.8k photo, Large breasts
